title: Aslia lacera
taxonomy: Aslia lacera belongs to the family of moths, specifically within the subfamily of Arctiinae. This species is a type of lichen moth, characterized by its unique appearance and color patterns. Aslia lacera is classified under the genus Aslia, which is a part of the larger order Lepidoptera. The classification of Aslia lacera reflects its distinct characteristics and evolutionary relationships with other moth species. Further research may be necessary to fully understand the taxonomic classification of this species.
